title: Mysterious Solana Project World Unveiled as Fully Onchain Prediction Market
summary: World.xyz, a mysterious Solana project, has been unveiled as a fully on-chain prediction market. The platform is now live within the Phantom wallet and at world.xyz, using Chainlink as its primary oracle infrastructure for market data.
body:
A long-awaited Solana project, World.xyz, has finally been unveiled as a fully on-chain prediction market. The platform is now live within the Phantom wallet and at world.xyz, allowing users to make predictions and trade outcomes directly on the blockchain.

World.xyz leverages Chainlink as its primary oracle infrastructure to provide accurate and reliable market data. This integration ensures that the prediction markets are based on verifiable, real-world data, enhancing the platform's credibility and usability.

For everyday users, this launch means a new way to engage with prediction markets without relying on centralized platforms. Users can participate in various markets, from sports to finance, with the transparency and security of blockchain technology.

To get started, users can access World.xyz directly through the Phantom wallet, making it easy to connect and start trading predictions. Keep an eye on the platform's development as it continues to expand its offerings and user base. Read more → https://www.coindesk.com/web3/2026/07/01/mysterious-solana-project-world-unveiled-as-fully-onchain-prediction-market

It uses Chainlink as its primary oracle infrastructure for reliable market data, ensuring transparent and verifiable predictions across sports, finance, and more.

Try it out through Phantom wallet. Watch for new markets and features as the platform grows. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-01-worldxyz-launches-as-fully-on-chain-solana-prediction-market
